mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(tree.TREE_CD) AS id , COALESCE(TRIM(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD), '#') AS parent , tree.TREE_NM AS text , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS VARCHAR) AS "level" , CASE WHEN tree.UPPER_TREE_CD IS NULL THEN 'root' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND CAST(child.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) <= 2 ) THEN 'group' ELSE 'item' END AS "type" , tree.SORT_ORDER AS sort , COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') AS useYn , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND CAST(child.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) <= 2 ) THEN '' ELSE 'documentNoPrefix' END AS filterType , tree.TREE_NM AS filterValue , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE child WHERE child.UPPER_TREE_CD = tree.TREE_CD AND COALESCE(child.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND CAST(child.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) <= 2 ) THEN '' ELSE tree.TREE_NM END AS documentNoPrefix , '' AS distributeTypeCd FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_TREE tree WHERE COALESCE(tree.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) <= 2 ORDER BY COALESCE(TRIM(tree.UPPER_TREE_CD), '#') , CAST(tree.TREE_DEPTH AS INTEGER) , COALESCE(tree.SORT_ORDER, 999999) , tree.TREE_NM

SELECT COALESCE( MAX( CASE WHEN split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 4) ~ '^[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(split_part(DOCUMENT_NO, '-', 4) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END ), 0 ) + 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT WHERE COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND TREE_CD = #{treeCd} AND DOCUMENT_NO LIKE ('K8-IOC-' || #{functionCode2No} || '-%')
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(FILE_NO), 0) + 1 FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE WHERE PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{parentObjectId}
INSERT INTO DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE ( OBJECT_ID , PARENT_OBJECT_ID , FILE_NO , ORG_FILE_NM , FILE_PATH_NM , FILE_SIZE , USE_YN , INSERT_UID , INSERT_DT , UPDATE_UID , UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId} , #{parentObjectId} , CAST(#{fileNo} AS INTEGER) , #{orgFileNm} , #{filePath} , CAST(#{fileSize} AS BIGINT) , COALESCE(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y') , COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userId}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}) , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , NULL , NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT info.OBJECT_ID AS objectId, COALESCE(info.INSERT_UID, '') AS insertUid, COALESCE(insertUser.USER_NM, COALESCE(info.REGISTER_USER, '')) AS insertUserNm, COALESCE(info.COPUBLISHER, '') AS coPublisher, COALESCE(info.APPROVER, '') AS approver, COALESCE(info.STATUS, '') AS status, COALESCE(info.APPROVED_USERS, '') AS approvedUsers, COALESCE(info.DELETED_YN, 'N') AS deletedYn FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT info LEFT JOIN DOCS_USER insertUser ON insertUser.USER_ID = info.INSERT_UID WHERE info.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}

SELECT OBJECT_ID AS objectId, COALESCE(APPROVER, '') AS approver, COALESCE(REVIEWERUSER, '') AS reviewerUser, COALESCE(STATUS, '') AS status, COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') AS approvedUsers, COALESCE(INSERT_UID, '') AS insertUid, COALESCE(REGISTER_USER, '') AS registerUser, COALESCE(INSERT_USER_NM, COALESCE(REGISTER_USER, '')) AS insertUserNm, COALESCE(COPUBLISHER, '') AS coPublisher, COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') AS deletedYn FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}

SELECT document.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", document.DOCUMENT_NO AS "documentNo", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", COALESCE(fileInfo.PROCESSING_STATUS, '') AS "processingStatus", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT document JOIN DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo ON fileInfo.OBJECT_ID = document.OBJECT_ID WHERE document.OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(document.DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT fileInfo.OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID AS "parentObjectId", fileInfo.FILE_NO AS "fileNo", fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS "orgFileNm", fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS "fileSize", fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS "filePath" FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_SUB_FILE fileInfo WHERE fileInfo.PARENT_OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(fileInfo.USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY CAST(fileInfo.FILE_NO AS INTEGER)
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT SET APPROVED_USERS = CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM regexp_split_to_table(COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, ''), ',') AS au(token) WHERE TRIM(au.token) = TRIM(#{approvedUser}) ) THEN COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(APPROVED_USERS), ''), '') = '' THEN #{approvedUser} ELSE COALESCE(APPROVED_USERS, '') || ',' || #{approvedUser} END, STATUS = CASE WHEN #{isFinal} = 'Y' THEN '승인완료' ELSE '승인진행중' END WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(DELETED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT OBJECT_ID AS "objectId", APPROVER_ID AS "approverId", COALESCE(COMMENT_TXT, '') AS "comment" FROM DOCS_DOC_APPROVAL_COMMENT WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DOCS_DOC_APPROVAL_COMMENT ( OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID, COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{approverId}, #{comment}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID) DO UPDATE SET COMMENT_TXT = EXCLUDED.COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT SET DELETED_YN = 'Y' WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'

UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE SET FILE_PATH_NM = #{filePath}, FILE_SIZE = #{fileSize}, PROCESSING_STATUS = 'DONE', PROCESSING_ERROR = NULL, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1
UPDATE DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE SET PROCESSING_STATUS = 'FAIL', PROCESSING_ERROR = #{errorMessage}, PROCESSED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{objectId} AND CAST(FILE_NO AS INTEGER) = 1
mapper.select:
SELECT u.USER_NM AS "userName", COALESCE(p.POSITION_NM, '') AS "positionName" FROM DOCS_USER u LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION p ON p.POSITION_CD = u.POSITION_CD WHERE u.USER_NM IN
#{name}
